svg.text: Decision intelligence system — fraud detection architecture

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain transaction source layer — ATM, POS, mobile, web API, card networks: payload schema, adapter design, TLS auth')
g.text: ATM · POS terminal · Mobile banking · Web API · Card network gateway

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Redpanda ingestion — partition key strategy for 10k TPS, topic design (txn-raw, txn-enriched, decisions, fraud-labels), consumer groups, schema registry')
g.text: txn-raw · txn-enriched · decisions · fraud-labels · schema registry · 10k TPS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Apache Flink stateful stream processing — session windows, velocity aggregations, CEP patterns, exactly-once semantics, and how features are pushed to the feature store')
sendPrompt('Explain Redis as Feast online store — sub-millisecond feature retrieval, TTL design, hot feature caching, push API, and which real-time features live here vs MinIO')
sendPrompt('Explain MinIO as Feast offline store — point-in-time joins, historical feature snapshots, training dataset generation, and how Airflow retraining jobs read from here')
sendPrompt('Deep dive Stage 1 LightGBM — feature set, early exit threshold calibration using conformal prediction, uncertainty estimation, and how sub-10ms latency is budgeted')
g.text: p < theta_low → early exit · uncertain → Stage 2

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain early exit approve path — what threshold qualifies, what is logged and audited, how the full approve response is returned in under 10ms, and what bypasses Stage 2 and 3')

sendPrompt('Explain Neo4j graph intelligence — transaction graph, device graph, identity graph, entity linkage for Device IDs + IPs, fraud ring detection, mule accounts, synthetic identities, and Cypher query patterns')
sendPrompt('Explain ML ensemble Stage 2 — XGBoost + neural network architecture, feature inputs from Redis and Neo4j, score fusion strategy, and SHAP feature importance output')

sendPrompt('Explain autoencoder anomaly detection — architecture, reconstruction error thresholding, training on normal transaction distribution, detecting novel fraud patterns outside training distribution')

sendPrompt('Deep dive Stage 3 decision optimization engine — full cost function math, CLV computation, trust score formula, uncertainty gating, argmin decision logic, and SHAP explanation generation for every decision')
g.text: inputs: P(fraud) · CLV · Amount · Trust Score · Uncertainty
output: action + confidence + SHAP explanation per decision

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the experimentation and A/B testing engine — shadow mode design, policy comparison framework, canary rollout strategy, and exactly how it sits between the decision engine and action execution to intercept and reroute decisions')
g.text: Shadow mode · Policy comparison · Canary rollout · pre-action policy validation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Approve action — conditions, downstream logging, audit trail, and difference between early-exit approve vs full 3-stage pipeline approve')
sendPrompt('Explain Block action — trigger conditions, enforcement mechanism, customer notification, and how the block event enters the fraud-labels Kafka topic for retraining')
sendPrompt('Explain step-up authentication — OTP and biometric challenge flows, CLV-gating logic, how MFA reduces false positives vs hard blocking, and the friction cost trade-off')

sendPrompt('Explain manual review queue — analyst UI design, SLA routing by risk score, priority queue logic, and how analyst label decisions are captured and written back to the fraud-labels Kafka topic')

sendPrompt('Explain continuous learning feedback loop — Airflow DAG design for retraining pipeline, MLflow model registry and promotion workflow, analyst label ingestion, chargeback signal processing, and how retraining triggers automatically')
g.text: Airflow · MLflow · analyst labels · chargebacks → feature store + model retraining

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Prometheus setup — which fraud and ML metrics are scraped, alert rules for fraud spikes and model drift, latency SLO configuration, and how each microservice exposes a /metrics endpoint')

sendPrompt('Explain Grafana dashboards — fraud KPI panels (revenue saved, FPR, detection rate), model drift detection, false positive rate trends, operational health, and A/B experiment result views')
